annotation.report: Operator log: The drive motor temperature exceeded the normal limit and continued rising under event reference 4490. An emergency shutdown is active because the condition presents imminent danger to personnel.
evidence: The drive motor temperature exceeded the normal limit and continued rising under event reference 4490.
An emergency shutdown is active because the condition presents imminent danger to personnel.
annotation.recommended_action: remove load and inspect cooling and lubrication

review.notes: Reviewed. Evidence, labels, and recommended action are fully supported by the report.

annotation.report: Shift handoff report: technicians compared local indications with the control-room display. An emergency shutdown is active because the condition presents imminent danger to personnel.

annotation.recommended_action: isolate and inspect the mechanical drive
